title: Majorly Optimized
description: Lightweight modpack focused on max performance and FPS.
body:
## Introducing Majorly Optimized! ### Ultra-lightweight Fabric optimization modpack focused entirely on maximum FPS.
Majorly Optimized was created with a single goal: > Deliver the best possible performance while staying extremely minimal. No gameplay changes. No content mods. No unnecessary extras. Just a carefully tuned optimization modpack designed to make Minecraft run **as fast as possible**. ---
[Join the NEW Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RTjhu3baNw)
---
## Why Majorly Optimized?
Most optimization modpacks try to include extra convenience features, visual tweaks, or small gameplay additions. Majorly Optimized takes a different approach. It stays **intentionally minimal** so it can act as a **clean performance foundation** for players and modpack creators. Because the pack is so lightweight, it becomes an ideal **base for building your own modpacks** ---
## Performance | Modpack | Avg FPS | Improvement vs Vanilla | |-----------------------|-----------|------------------------| | Vanilla | ~1800 | — | | VulkanMod | ~2200 | **+22%** | | Sodium | ~2450 | **+36%** | | Fabulously Optimized | ~2500 | **+39%** | | Remarkably Optimized | ~2650 | **+47%** | | **Majorly Optimized** | **~3500** | **+94%** |
> Benchmarks performed on the same world and core settings for consistency. --- ## Included Mods
View Full Mod List - Bad Optimalizations - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - GPUBooster - ImmediatelyFast - Krypton - Lithium - ModernFix - More Culling - Palladium - ScalableLux - Sodium - Sodium Extra
--- ## Benchmark System - **CPU:** AMD Ryzen 7 9700X - **GPU:** AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT - **RAM:** 32GB ---
### Built for performance. Made with ❤️ by **majorDTJ**
